description: Sci-fi adjectives for describing futuristic and technological items.
adjectives: Operating at the subatomic level with impossible precision.
Projected as a three-dimensional image of light.
Blending organic life with mechanical enhancement.
Built from microscopic machines too small to see.
Spanning the vast distances between stars.
Powered by the splitting or fusing of atoms.
Keyed to a specific person's unique biology.
Locked behind layers of unbreakable code.
Born of digital networks and virtual space.
Empty and dark as the space between stars.
An experimental first version, untested and unique.
Malfunctioning with flickering errors and static.
Self-aware and capable of independent thought.
Artificially manufactured rather than naturally occurring.
Hidden from sensors and sight by advanced technology.
